stemHtml: How should "Squawk 2400" and "altitude 2400 ft" be transmitted correctly?

options.a: Squawk two four zero zero, altitude two four zero zero.
options.b: Squawk two four zero zero, altitude two thousand four hundred.
options.c: Squawk two thousand four hundred, altitude two four zero zero.
options.d: Squawk two thousand four hundred, altitude two thousand four hundred.
